tools.name: ruff
tools.run_command: uv run ruff check sdk/python/feast/ sdk/python/tests/
tools.fix_command: uv run ruff check --fix sdk/python/feast/ sdk/python/tests/ && uv run ruff format sdk/python/feast/ sdk/python/tests/

tools.name: mypy
tools.run_command: uv run bash -c "cd sdk/python && mypy feast"

linting.notes: Primary linting is for Python (ruff + mypy). Pre-commit hooks configured in .pre-commit-config.yaml run format and lint on changed files only.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses pytest fixtures, testcontainers for services (Redis, etc.)
testing.notes: Unit tests exclude Ray and Spark components by default. Integration tests require cloud credentials (AWS, GCP, Snowflake) and external services. Use -n auto or -n 8 for parallel execution. Fast subset: sdk/python/tests/unit only.

advisory_checks.name: integration-test-python
advisory_checks.notes: Requires 'ok-to-test' label, AWS/GCP credentials, Snowflake access

ci.notes: Python tests run on matrix of 3.10, 3.11, 3.12 on ubuntu-latest and macos-14. Integration tests require manual approval via 'ok-to-test' label and use pull_request_target for security. Operator tests use Go 1.22.9.

build.notes: Python uses uv for dependency management with locked requirements. Protobuf compilation via make compile-protos-python. Go operator builds with make -C infra/feast-operator build. Java builds with mvn clean verify.

conventions.import_style: Absolute imports from feast.* in Python. Grouped imports enforced by ruff.
conventions.notes: Python code formatted with ruff (88 char line length). Type hints required and checked with mypy. Tests organized by unit/, integration/, component/ directories.

lint_commands.command: uv run ruff check sdk/python/feast/ sdk/python/tests/
uv run ruff format --check sdk/python/feast/ sdk/python/tests/
uv run bash -c 'cd sdk/python && mypy feast'
lint_commands.notes: Success: no issues found in 546 source files

container_recipe.notes: Container needs --link-mode=copy or UV_LINK_MODE=copy if on different filesystem. Use -n 8 for parallel tests. Exclude Ray/Spark components for unit tests.

results.command: uv run ruff check sdk/python/feast/ sdk/python/tests/
uv run ruff format --check sdk/python/feast/ sdk/python/tests/
uv run bash -c 'cd sdk/python && mypy feast'
results.output_snippet: Success: no issues found in 546 source files
results.notes: Type checking passed (notes are informational only)

validation.summary: install OK, lint OK (ruff + mypy passed), tests OK (1 passed)

gaps: Integration tests require external cloud credentials (AWS, GCP, Snowflake) - cannot run in isolated container
Some integration tests require Redis, PostgreSQL, or other databases - use testcontainers or external services
Operator tests require Kubernetes environment (envtest or real cluster)
Java and Go tests not validated in this analysis - separate containers would be needed
UI tests require Node.js/Yarn environment - not validated
Full test suite is very large and slow - use pattern filtering for targeted testing
